mapper.select:
SELECT U.user_id , U.user_pw , U.user_type , UU.login_id , UU.login_name , UU.type_id , UU.sub_type_id FROM user U
JOIN ( SELECT user_id , platform_manager_code AS login_id , platform_manager_name AS login_name , user_id AS type_id , NULL AS sub_type_id FROM platform_manager WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND no_use = 0 ) UU ON U.user_id = UU.user_id
JOIN ( SELECT user_id , company_manager_code AS login_id , company_manager_name AS login_name , company_id AS type_id , NULL AS sub_type_id FROM company_manager WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND no_use = 0 ) UU ON U.user_id = UU.user_id
JOIN ( SELECT HM.user_id , HM.center_manager_code AS login_id , HM.center_manager_name AS login_name , C.hospital_id AS type_id , C.center_id AS sub_type_id FROM center_manager HM JOIN center C ON C.center_id = HM.center_id WHERE HM.deleted_at IS NULL AND C.deleted_at IS NULL AND HM.no_use = 0 ) UU ON U.user_id = UU.user_id
JOIN ( SELECT E.user_id , E.employee_code AS login_id , E.employee_name AS login_name , E.company_id AS type_id , NULL AS sub_type_id FROM employee E JOIN company C ON E.company_id = C.company_id WHERE E.deleted_at IS NULL AND C.deleted_at IS NULL AND E.myself = 1 AND E.no_use = 0 AND C.company_code = #{companyCode} ) UU ON U.user_id = UU.user_id
WHERE U.deleted_at IS NULL AND U.user_type = #{userType} AND UU.login_id = #{loginId}
